atoms.docstring_summary: Compute softmax cross-entropy loss with optional auxiliary logit branch.
Infer consensus labels from an ensemble of model predictions.
Targeted-attack variant of momentum_gradient_accumulation.
Map ground-truth targets to anchor-grid labels via 3D IoU.
Extract center 2x2x2 cube from a 5D feature map and max-pool.
Segment lungs from a CT volume, removing bone and table artifacts.
risk_reasons: Complex multi-stage pipeline with many heuristic thresholds from competition code.

atoms.docstring_summary: Rotate, scale, and translate around the image center.
Enhance retinal detail by subtracting a broad blurred background.
Apply a clipped linear brightness and contrast adjustment.
Apply configured transforms when their explicit random draws pass.
Replace a rectangular region with pixels from another sample.
Fill a rectangular region with a constant value.
Reverse an image or tensor along one axis.
Average fold predictions using arithmetic, geometric, or rank scores.
Convert RGB images to a one-channel luminance image.
Apply a repeated square occlusion pattern to an image.
Shift hue circularly and saturation additively in RGB images.
Scale values into the unit interval with safe constant handling.
Compute convex pixel and label blends between two samples.
Standardize color channels with supplied means and spread values.
Normalize one image by its own mean and standard deviation.
Crop a known region and resize it to fixed spatial dimensions.
Resize while preserving aspect ratio, then pad to the target size.
Return center, corner, and horizontal-flip crops for classification.
Average model outputs over ten deterministic classification crops.
Undo geometric test-time transforms and average aligned predictions.
Compute pairwise contrastive loss for same and different embedding pairs.
Compute discrete CRPS against a step CDF at each observed bin index.
review_limitations: Observed values are bin indices rather than physical yard values.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute log-space CTC negative log-likelihood with blank label zero.
Compute soft Dice loss from probability and target masks.
Compute binary focal loss for imbalanced classification probabilities.
Compute cross-entropy after mixing one-hot labels with uniform mass.
Compute the Lovasz extension surrogate for Jaccard overlap loss.
review_limitations: Targets are expected as binary or one-hot masks with the same shape as probabilities.

atoms.docstring_summary: Penalize positive examples predicted below a probability threshold.
Compute mixture trajectory negative log-likelihood with unit variance.
review_limitations: Uses unit variance and omits Gaussian normalization constants.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute differentiable quadratic weighted kappa loss for ordinal classes.
Compute margin triplet loss over aligned anchor, positive, and negative rows.
review_limitations: Uses explicit triplet rows instead of mining triplets from labels.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute stable binary cross-entropy with per-sample weights.
Combine scalar task losses with fixed non-negative task weights.
review_limitations: Implements fixed explicit weights, not learned uncertainty weighting.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute TRON's BPR-Max ranking loss with softmax-weighted regularization.
review_limitations: This atom drops the upstream mask argument and averages over all rows.

atoms.docstring_summary: Sample negatives for each item from other items in the same batch.
review_limitations: The simplified API samples from the batch as a flat pool and does not preserve TRON's per-session boundary metadata.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute sampled softmax cross-entropy with the positive score as class 0.
review_limitations: This atom drops the upstream mask argument and averages over all rows.

atoms.docstring_summary: Sample uniform negatives with replacement while avoiding excluded items.
review_limitations: The simplified API always rejects the provided excluded items and does not expose TRON's sampling-style shape logic.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute the recursive exponential-smoothing level sequence.
Extract multiplicative seasonal factors as observation-to-level ratios.
Compute the quantile-regression pinball loss.
Combine M4-style sMAPE and MASE into a scalar loss.
review_limitations: This atom intentionally follows the requested evaluation-style API rather than the upstream training-loss class of the same name.

atoms.docstring_summary: Select indices of the highest-scoring negatives for hard mining.
Oversample bounding boxes based on nodule diameter thresholds.
Sample k indices without replacement using temperature-scaled softmax.
